name: RPlog_Punishment_for_the_Prodigal
title: Punishment for the Prodigal
summary: In a windowless, stifling underground room on Tatooine, the sharp-toothed captor Mephisto looms in the shadows over the recovered captive Ylsa, relishing the lesson he intends to teach her for the indiscretions that forced his crew to hide from the Imperials. As the brutal ordeal unfolds, Ylsa is haunted by Mephisto's assault and by the possible death of Paul, withdrawing into herself for fear and meditation while others, including Ilyana and Ullo, move about the grim hideout. The dark, claustrophobic scene chronicles the prodigal's punishment and the despair it breeds.
